Taboo Challenge

Taboo Challenge is a fast-paced word guessing game where you race against time to describe target words without using forbidden "taboo" words. Score points by successfully guessing words, but be careful - using a taboo word costs you points! Complete multiple rounds to achieve the highest score possible.

Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options | Space: Confirm selection, mark correct, or skip | Shift: Mark incorrect (taboo used) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart
